title: Same item in array
excerpt:
in fact i have a problems, i need to find how to don’t have a same item in a same array. 
Do you have a solution for that ?

posts.cookedHtml: Hey there! Sorry for the late response! Are you still encountering issues with setting up your items? If so, send us a message at support@monday.com and we would be happy to help!
